name: agent-builder
description: Standalone plugin companion for designing and evaluating agentic harnesses with research synthesis, prompt contracts, and an architecture catalog

interface.shortDescription: Plugin companion for designing and evaluating agentic harnesses
interface.longDescription: Standalone plugin companion for the Agent Builder app. It provides the cross-LLM skill, research synthesis, reusable templates, Prompt Builder prompt contracts, and an empirical catalog covering architectures, frameworks, memory substrates, lab patterns, and local/open-source model agents without requiring the local app.
